title: ListBox Properties
description:
ListBox Properties

ListBox Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the ListBox control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

AddItem	Adds an item to the list at runtime.
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs)

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

BorderStyle	Determines the border style of the control.

Default: 2 -
		 Fixed3D

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	The type of task used for events.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Font	Selects the font for the text in the
		 control.

Default: Microsoft
		 Sans Serif, 8.25pt.

FontBold	The bold attribute for the current font
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontItalic	The italic attribute for the current
		 font (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontName	The name for the current font (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: Microsoft Sans Serif

FontSize	The size for the current font in points
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 8.25

ForeColor	Selects the forecolor for the control.

Default: ControlText

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Default:

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

List	Use to access
		 the items in the list at runtime. (Only available from SPEL+ programs)

ListCount	Use to get
		 the number of items in the list at runtime.

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 ListBox control.

Default: ListBoxXX

SelectedIndex	Use to determine
		 which item has been selected by the operator at runtime. (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs)

Sorted	Gets or sets a value indicating whether
		 the items in the ListBox are sorted alphabetically.

Default: 0 -
		 False

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

ToolTipText	Sets the text
		 for the tooltip.

Default:

Top	Sets the location of the top of the
		 ListBox control.

Default:

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the ListBox control.

Default:

Event	Description

Click	Executes when the user clicks the control
		 with the mouse.

DblClick	Executes when the user double clicks
		 the control with the mouse.
